name: TD First Class Visa Signature® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 25,000 bonus miles/points after spending $3,000 in first 6 billing cycles

earning_rates.category: Travel (airfare, hotels, car rentals, travel agencies)
earning_rates.notes: 3x TD Points on travel purchased through any travel provider
1x TD Point on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select

notes: Annual fee $89 (waived first year). 3x on all travel. Priority Pass Select lounge access. Strong for frequent travelers with TD Bank relationship.
